rows.label: tlk41700151_01_msg0001
rows.name:
Have you ever gone down
below this Alba Margen?

rows.label: tlk41700151_01_msg0002
rows.name:
You can only go when
the Cloud Sea is low.

rows.label: tlk41700151_01_msg0003
rows.name:
When you live on a Divine Beast,
like in Gula or Superbia, you're hit
by the Cloud Sea directly, right?

rows.label: tlk41700151_01_msg0004
rows.name:
That's why most cities are
built on high ground where
the effects are less severe.

rows.label: tlk41700151_01_msg0005
rows.name:
I envy places like Avaritia, which
floats on the Cloud Sea, or Invidia,
with its city inside the Divine Beast.
